channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Jazz lose heartbreaker to Indiana, 112-111
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Jazz could not hold a 12-point lead in the final six minutes, and lose to the Indiana Pacers Monday night at the Delta Center, 112-111.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Chiefs' Butker enters his 5th Super Bowl confident in his kicking and his beliefs
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Kansas City Chiefs kicker Harrison Butker, who tends to be talkative on the subject of his Christian faith, briefly went silent on Monday night when he was asked, “What do you think about gays?” “I understand that this is a great evening and we’re here to focus on the game,” Butke
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Chiefs and Eagles handle the Super Bowl opening night spectacle like they've been here, done that
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Patrick Mahomes treated Super Bowl opening night like a two-minute drill, providing rapid-fire answers to one question after another. Travis Kelce passed on an inquiry about popping the question to Taylor Swift. Been here, done that.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Young's fadeaway with 1.6 seconds left lifts Hawks to slump-busting 132-130 win over Pistons
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Trae Young made a 23-foot fadeaway with 1.6 seconds left and scored 17 of his 34 points in the fourth quarter, lifting the Atlanta Hawks to a 132-130 win over the Detroit Pistons on Monday night. Young helped the Hawks end an eight-game losing streak.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Caleb Williams voted GQ's most stylish football player
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Chicago Bears quarterback Caleb Williams has earned his first accolade since joining the NFL as the league's No. 1 overall pick last April. He took home GQ's fan vote for the Most Stylish Football Player Monday.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: MLB ump fired amid gambling probe
item.description: Major League Baseball has fired an umpire as part of an investigation into sports gambling. Umpire Pat Hoberg was fired after it was revealed he shared betting accounts with a friend who bet on baseball, according to ESPN reporter Jesse Rogers and later confirmed by the league.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: WWE legend Triple H reflects on surprise Hall of Fame announcement
item.description: WWE Chief Content Officer Paul "Triple" Levesque reflected on the way he was told he would be in the company's Hall of Fame as a solo wrestler this year.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Doncic releases emotional farewell message to Dallas after trade sends him to Lakers
item.description: Luka Doncic released an emotional farewell to Dallas on Sunday, the same day a trade sending him from the Mavericks to the Los Angeles Lakers in a swap for fellow All-NBA player Anthony Davis was finalized.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Rory McIlroy overpowers Pebble Beach and wins in a runaway
item.description: The combination of one of golf's biggest stars and America's most scenic coastal golf course was the just the spark the PGA Tour needed, and both lived up to their reputations Sunday in the AT&T Pebble Beach Pro-Am.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: South Carolina retires jersey number of three-time WNBA MVP A’ja Wilson
item.description: Three-time WNBA MVP A’ja Wilson's South Carolina No. 22 jersey was hung in the rafters Sunday at Colonial Life Arena, her college home court that already features a statue of the program’s all-time leading scorer outside the main entrance.
item.dc:creator: PETE IACOBELLI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Where to watch Super Bowl LIX in San Diego
item.description: Football fans who want to participate in the excitement of Super Bowl LIX without traveling to New Orleans or watching from their living room can watch the big game at several venues in San Diego.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: MMA fighter praises Hitler, calls him a 'good guy' in podcast
item.description: UFC fighter Bryce Mitchell praised Adolf Hitler and denied the Holocaust happened in the first episode of his new podcast.
item.dc:creator: Kyler Swaim, Fox 5

item.title: Ha-Seong Kim agrees to 2-year deal worth $29 million with Rays, AP source says
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rays and free agent Ha-Seong Kim have agreed to a two-year contract valued at $29 million, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Local pro bull rider representing Navajo Nation
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Pro Bull Riders Tour is coming back to Salt Lake City next weekend for the Unleash the Beats event at the Delta Center. At this level, the relationship between bull rider and bull has to be in sync, like a wild dance.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: No Super Bowl rally if Kansas City Chiefs beat Philadelphia Eagles: Sources
item.description: Multiple sources have confirmed that should the Kansas City Chiefs win Super Bowl LIX, there will be no rally for the public.
item.dc:creator: Alyssa Mueller, NewsNation

item.title: Dwyane Wade reveals cancer diagnosis, kidney surgery
item.description: The Chicago native shared the story of the "shocking" diagnosis and the emotional toll it took on him on the latest episode of his 'The Why' podcast.
item.dc:creator: BJ Lutz, NewsNation

item.title: Girls Basketball: Westview 54, Mission Hills 53
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Girls hoops in San Marcos on Tuesday night with the Grizzlies hosting Westview. Wolverines win a nail biter 54-53.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Report: Courtney Vandersloot expected to sign with Chicago Sky
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Courtney Vandersloot, a former multi-time all-star and WNBA champion with the Chicago Sky, is expected to return to the franchise, according to the Chicago Sun-Times' Annie Costabile.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Super Bowl LIX will be 'No Drone Zone' amid incursions
item.description: Airspace over the Caesars Superdome in New Orleans will be heavily restricted from drones during Super Bowl LIX.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation
